name: python3-pyexcel-text
title: python3-pyexcel-text
description:
Plugin for pyexcel (Python 3)
This package contains a plugin to pyexcel and extends its capbility to present
and write data in text fromats mainly through tabulate: "plain" "simple" "grid"
"pipe" "orgtbl" "rst" "mediawiki" "latex" "latex_booktabs" "json" "html".
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyexcel-text because Plugin for pyexcel (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyexcel-text as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyexcel-text with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyexcel-text --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
